settings.label: the beginning
settings.text: The day you met — and rode them for the first time.

settings.label: the big one
settings.text: The biggest win. Perhaps even the Olympics.

settings.label: retirement
settings.text: The day they retired from competition.

settings.title: Consultation
settings.text: Together we choose the metal, the braid style, and the engraving — the name, a date, or a quiet reminder.

settings.title: Send the Hair
settings.text: We send you our signature envelope. Cut a small strand from your horse's mane and post it back to us.

settings.title: Crafting
settings.text: In our Prague atelier, master jewellers braid the strand and seal it into solid metal — by hand.

settings.title: Delivery
settings.text: Your piece arrives in signature packaging with the certificate of authenticity.
